# Bxc: Zero-Spawn Browser Engine for AI Agents

Bxc (Browser-X) is a native, zero-spawn, high-performance web browser automation engine designed for the Bun runtime. By combining a Rust-compiled FFI bridge, native Zig DOM bindings, and stealth browser profiles, Bxc achieves sub-millisecond execution times for AI agents.

## Core Capabilities
- **Zero-Spawn**: Native, in-process Chromium CDP and Static DOM transports. No heavy Puppeteer/Playwright headless processes.
- **Stealth Profiles**: Automated Cloudflare and Turnstile bot bypass using Ghost browsers and automated click models.
- **Google Atlas**: Deep scanning of Google domains, routing, and vertical parameters.
- **WBO Metagame Tracking**: Automated parsing of tournament podium finishes and player standings from World Beyblade Organization forums.

---

## Quick Start (Bun FFI)

```typescript
import { Browser } from "@aphrody-code/bxc";

// Initialize stealth browser
const page = await Browser.newPage({ profile: "stealth" });

// Sub-millisecond navigation
await page.goto("https://example.com");

// Extract clean markdown for LLM context
const markdown = await page.markdown();
console.log(markdown);

await page.close();
```

---

## 🛠️ CLI Interface

```bash
# Get user profile information
bxc worldbeyblade profile aphrody --pretty

# Start Elysia dashboard & API server
bxc api
# or
bun run server:start
```

---

## 🤖 Native MCP Tools Reference

Bxc registers these stdio MCP tools under the `bxc-native-mcp` server:

- **`tune_memory_sqlite`**: Store/retrieve memory facts in the local SQLite db.
- **`bxc_scrape_markdown`**: Convert any target page to GFM markdown.
- **`bxc_detect_frameworks`**: Identify site frameworks and bot protections.
- **`bxc_cdp_evaluate`**: Run raw JS inside the V8 context.
- **`bxc_search`**: High-performance rich Google searches.
- **`bxc_google_fetch`**: Fetch markdown and JSON-LD/meta tags in one pass.
- **`bxc_wbo_rankings`**: Query WBO player standings & leaderboards.
- **`bxc_wbo_metagame`**: Query WBO Beyblade X competitive metagame stats.

---

- [Serverless Deployments](SERVERLESS.md) — Deploying Bxc on Vercel or AWS Lambda.
- [Windows Cross-Compiling](BUILD-WINDOWS.md) — MSVC standalone building guides.
- [Lightpanda Integration](LIGHTPANDA-WINDOWS.md) — FFI-based WebAssembly browser engine hooks.
